_doc: Quiz-poll engagement bait for the Telegram channel. Each drives to an article via the explanation. Runner posts the next un-posted one.

polls.q: How many contractors does Angi sell each lead to?
polls.explain: 5–12 — which is why your real cost per booked job runs $1,400+. booked-job.com/blog/is-angi-worth-it/

polls.q: A 50% markup equals what PROFIT MARGIN?
polls.explain: 33% — markup ≠ margin. Most shops underprice here. booked-job.com/blog/how-to-price-a-job/

polls.q: What % of contractor invoices go unpaid past 30 days?
polls.explain: ~30% — a same-day follow-up text fixes most of it. booked-job.com

polls.q: Best time to ask for a Google review?
polls.explain: Peak gratitude — ask when the job's done, then text the link. booked-job.com/blog/get-more-google-reviews/

polls.q: In the slow season, smart shops...
polls.explain: Increase it — competitors go quiet, ad costs drop. booked-job.com/blog/surviving-the-slow-season/
